---
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---
```{r, setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(haven)
library(survey)
library(broom)
library(ggplot2)
library(purrr)
library(pROC)
library(car) 
library(survey)
library(surveyROC)
library(svyROC)
library(srvyr)
library(vroom)
library(caret)
library(misty)
library(mvnmle)
library(naniar)
library(gridExtra)
library(mice)
library(effsize)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = rprojroot::find_rstudio_root_file())
data_path_2000_2015 <- file.path("data", "NHTSA_databases", "NHTSA All files")
```

```{r universal variables}
min_DV_MPH <- 5
max_DV_MPH <- 40
```


```{r general functions}
# Function to format p-values
format_p <- function(p) {
  ifelse(p < 0.001, "<0.001", round(p, digits = 3))
}
```

```{r get MADYMO HIC values and build MADYMO dataframe, eval=FALSE}
# create dataframe with MADYMO data
BELTUSE_BIN <- c(0, 1)
BAGDEPLOY_BIN <- c(0, 1)
SEATPOS <- c(11, 13)
madymo_DV_MPH <- 5:65

MADYMO_df <- data.frame()
MADYMO_df <- expand.grid(
  BELTUSE_BIN = BELTUSE_BIN,
  BAGDEPLOY_BIN = BAGDEPLOY_BIN,
  SEATPOS = SEATPOS,
  DV_MPH = madymo_DV_MPH
)

MADYMO_df$BELTUSE_BIN <- as.factor(MADYMO_df$BELTUSE_BIN)
MADYMO_df$BAGDEPLOY_BIN <- as.factor(MADYMO_df$BAGDEPLOY_BIN)
MADYMO_df$SEATPOS <- as.factor(MADYMO_df$SEATPOS)

# write madymo dataframe (without HIC data) to .csv file for reference outside of this code
# write.csv(MADYMO_df, file = file.path("data", "MADYMO_df.csv"))

MADYMO_df <- MADYMO_df %>%
  mutate(
    file_path = file.path(
      "data",
      "minimal_simulations",
      paste0(DV_MPH, "_mph"),
      ifelse(SEATPOS == 11, "driver", "pass"),
      ifelse(BELTUSE_BIN == 0, "nobelt", "belt"),
      ifelse(BAGDEPLOY_BIN == 0, "noairbag", "airbag"),
      "madymo",
      "madymo.peak"
    )
  )

MADYMO_df <- MADYMO_df %>%
  mutate(
    HIC15 = NA,
    T1_15 = NA,
    T2_15 = NA,
    HIC36 = NA,
    T1_36 = NA,
    T2_36 = NA,
    PEAK_LACC = NA,
    PEAK_AACC = NA
  )


# check if all files exist
file_exist_errors <- list()
for (i in MADYMO_df$file_path[1:nrow(MADYMO_df)]) {
  if (!file.exists(file.path(i))) {
    file_exist_errors[i] <- i}
}

# print error message
if (length(file_exist_errors) != 0) {
  cat("Files missing:", paste(file_exist_errors, "\n"))
} else {
  cat("No MADYMO files missing")
}

# Initialize a list to store file names that caused errors
error_names <- c()

# Loop through each file in the "file_path_name" column of MADYMO_df
# Loop through each file in the "file_path" column of MADYMO_df
for (i in 1:nrow(MADYMO_df)) {  # Process the first 5 files for testing
  file_name <- MADYMO_df$file_path[i]
  cat("Processing file:", file_name, "\n")
  
  # Use tryCatch to handle errors (like missing files)
  result <- tryCatch({
    # Step 1: Read the file into R
    cat("Attempting to read file:", file_name, "\n")
    lines <- readLines(file_name)
    
    print(paste("Loading", file_name))
    
    # Initialize empty variables to store the extracted values
    HIC15 <- NA
    T1_15 <- NA
    T2_15 <- NA
    HIC36 <- NA
    T1_36 <- NA
    T2_36 <- NA
    PEAK_LACC <- NA
    PEAK_AACC <- NA
    
    cat("Successfully read file:", file_name, "\n")
    
    # Function to extract the numeric values from the line
    extract_hic_values <- function(line) {
      # Extract VALUE
      value <- as.numeric(gsub(".*VALUE[^0-9]*([0-9\\.]+).*", "\\1", line))
      
      # Extract T1
      t1 <- as.numeric(gsub(".*T1\\s*=\\s*([0-9\\.]+).*", "\\1", line))
      
      # Extract T2
      t2 <- as.numeric(gsub(".*T2\\s*=\\s*([0-9\\.]+).*", "\\1", line))
      
      return(list(value = value, t1 = t1, t2 = t2))
    }
    
    # Function to extract the third number (maximum resultant acceleration) from the "Res. acceleration" line
    extract_res_acceleration <- function(line) {
      # Use regular expression to capture all numbers, including scientific notation
      matches <- regmatches(line, gregexpr("[+-]?\\d*\\.?\\d+(E[+-]?\\d+)?", line))
      
      # Extract the third number from the matched results
      if (length(matches[[1]]) >= 3) {
        res_acc <- as.numeric(matches[[1]][4])  # The third number
      } else {
        res_acc <- NA
      }
      
      return(res_acc)
    }
    
    # Step 2: Loop through the lines to find relevant information
    for (j in 1:(length(lines) - 2)) {
      
      # Check for HIC15_inj line
      if (grepl("HIC15_inj", lines[j])) {
        # Extract VALUE, T1, and T2 from the next-next line
        value_line <- lines[j + 2]
        
        values_15 <- extract_hic_values(value_line)
        HIC15 <- values_15$value
        T1_15 <- values_15$t1
        T2_15 <- values_15$t2
      }
      
      # Check for HIC36_inj line
      if (grepl("HIC36_inj", lines[j])) {
        # Extract VALUE, T1, and T2 from the next-next line
        value_line <- lines[j + 2]
        
        values_36 <- extract_hic_values(value_line)
        HIC36 <- values_36$value
        T1_36 <- values_36$t1
        T2_36 <- values_36$t2
      }
      
      # Check for the /HumanMale50%/HeadCG_acc identifier line
      if (grepl("/HumanMale50%/HeadCG_acc", lines[j])) {
        cat("Found /HumanMale50%/HeadCG_acc at line", j, "\n")
        
        # Look for the "Res. acceleration" line in the next few lines
        for (k in (j+1):(j+5)) {  # We check the next 5 lines to find the "Res. acceleration" line
          if (grepl("Res. acceleration", lines[k])) {
            cat("Found Res. acceleration at line", k, "\n")
            
            # Extract the maximum resultant acceleration
            PEAK_LACC <- extract_res_acceleration(lines[k])
            cat("Extracted max resultant acceleration (m/s/s) (PEAK_LACC):", PEAK_LACC, "\n")
            break
          }
        }
      }
      
      # Check for the /HumanMale50%/Head_aac identifier line
      if (grepl("/HumanMale50%/Head_aac", lines[j])) {
        cat("Found /HumanMale50%/Head_aac at line", j, "\n")
        
        # Look for the "Res. ang. acc." line in the next few lines
        for (k in (j+1):(j+5)) {  # We check the next 5 lines to find the "Res. ang. acc." line
          if (grepl("Res. ang. acc.", lines[k])) {
            cat("Found Res. ang. acc. at line", k, "\n")
            
            # Extract the maximum resultant acceleration
            PEAK_AACC <- extract_res_acceleration(lines[k])
            cat("Extracted max resultant acceleration (PEAK_AACC):", PEAK_AACC, "\n")
            break
          }
        }
      }
    }
    
    # Step 3: Assign the extracted values to the corresponding row in MADYMO_df
    MADYMO_df$HIC15[i] <- HIC15
    MADYMO_df$T1_15[i] <- T1_15
    MADYMO_df$T2_15[i] <- T2_15
    MADYMO_df$HIC36[i] <- HIC36
    MADYMO_df$T1_36[i] <- T1_36
    MADYMO_df$T2_36[i] <- T2_36
    MADYMO_df$PEAK_LACC[i] <- PEAK_LACC
    MADYMO_df$PEAK_AACC[i] <- PEAK_AACC
    
    TRUE  # Indicate success
  }, error = function(e) {
    # Add the file name to error_names if there was an error
    cat("Error in processing file:", file_name, "\n")
    error_names <<- c(error_names, file_name)
    FALSE  # Indicate failure
  })
  
  # Log successful or failed processing
  if (result) {
    cat("File processed successfully:", file_name, "\n")
  } else {
    cat("Skipping file due to error:", file_name, "\n")
  }
}

# convert LACC to g
MADYMO_df$PEAK_LACC_g <- MADYMO_df$PEAK_LACC / 9.81

# Print the list of files that caused errors
if (length(error_names) > 0) {
  cat(length(error_names), " Files with errors:", paste(error_names, collapse = ", "), "\n")
} else {
  cat("No errors occurred during processing.\n")
}

MADYMO_df$SEATPOS <- as.factor(MADYMO_df$SEATPOS)
MADYMO_df$BELTUSE_BIN <- as.factor(MADYMO_df$BELTUSE_BIN)
MADYMO_df$BAGDEPLOY_BIN <- as.factor(MADYMO_df$BAGDEPLOY_BIN)

# vroom write MADYMO_df to csv
vroom::vroom_write(MADYMO_df, file = file.path("data", "MADYMO_df.csv"))


```

```{r create nhtsa dataframe, eval=FALSE}
# Helper function to process data for each year
vehicle_count <- 0
individual_count <- 0

process_year <- function(year) {
  # Load datasets (replace paths as necessary)
  # occupant injury
  oi <- read_sas(file.path(data_path_2000_2015, paste0(year, "oi.sas7bdat")))
  # occupant 
  oa <- read_sas(file.path(data_path_2000_2015, paste0(year, "oa.sas7bdat")))
  # general vehicle
  gv <- read_sas(file.path(data_path_2000_2015, paste0(year, "gv.sas7bdat")))
  # vehicle event
  ve <- read_sas(file.path(data_path_2000_2015, paste0(year, "ve.sas7bdat")))
  # accident
  accident <- read_sas(file.path(data_path_2000_2015, paste0(year, "accident.sas7bdat")))
  
  print(paste("Year:", year))
  
  
  # Injury processing
  injury_temp <- oi %>%
    mutate(
      # Handle column name inconsistencies
      BODYREG = if ("BODYREG" %in% names(.)) BODYREG else bodyreg,
      LESION = if ("LESION" %in% names(.)) LESION else lesion
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      BACK = ifelse(BODYREG == "B", 1, 0),
      NECK = ifelse(BODYREG == "N", 1, 0),
      CONCUSSION = ifelse(LESION == "K", 1, 0),
      AIS1 = ifelse(AIS >= 1 & AIS <= 6, 1, 0)
    )
  
  
  print(paste("all injuries count:", nrow(injury_temp)))
  ifelse(year == 2000, print(colnames(injury_temp)), print(""))
  
  # Summarize injuries (1 row per occupant)
  injury_summary <- injury_temp %>%
    group_by(PSU, CASENO, VEHNO, OCCNO, RATWGT) %>%
    summarise(
      BACK = max(BACK, na.rm = TRUE),
      NECK = max(NECK, na.rm = TRUE),
      CONCUSSION = max(CONCUSSION, na.rm = TRUE),
      AIS1 = max(AIS1, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    # Replace -Inf with NA (from max(na.rm=TRUE when all values are NA)
    mutate(across(everything(), ~ ifelse(is.infinite(.), NA, .)))
  
  print(
    paste(
    "all injured individuals count:", 
    nrow(
      injury_summary)))

  
  # Start with occupant data (oa) and LEFT JOIN injuries
  
  occ <- oa %>%
    # Merge injury data (retain all occupants, even if uninjured)
    left_join(injury_summary, by = c("PSU", "CASENO", "VEHNO", "OCCNO", "RATWGT")) %>%
    # Replace NA with 0 for injury columns (uninjured occupants)
    mutate(
      across(c(BACK, NECK, CONCUSSION, AIS1), ~ replace_na(., 0)),
      OI = ifelse(BACK == 1 | NECK == 1 | CONCUSSION == 1 | AIS1 == 1, 1, 0),
      BELTUSE_BIN = ifelse(MANUSE %in% c(0, 1), 0, ifelse(MANUSE == 4, 1, NA)),
      BAGDEPLOY_BIN = ifelse(BAGDEPLY == 1, 1, 0),
      BMI = WEIGHT / ((HEIGHT / 100) ^ 2),
      BMI_HIGH = ifelse(BMI >= 30, 1, 0)
    )
    ifelse(year == 2000, print(colnames(occ)), print(""))

    
  # count all individuals involved in all crashes in all years
  oa_grouped <- oa %>%
    group_by(PSU, CASENO, OCCNO, RATWGT)
  individual_count <<- individual_count + nrow(oa_grouped)
  
  
  
  
  print(paste("injured + uninjured count:", nrow(occ)))
  
  
  
  # Vehicle data
  veh <- gv %>%
    inner_join(ve, by = c("PSU", "CASENO", "VEHNO", "RATWGT")) %>%
    mutate(
      # KEEP = ifelse(
      #   DOF1 %in% c(
      #     1, 11, 12, 21, 31, 
      #     32, 41, 51, 52, 61, 
      #     71, 72, 81, 91, 92
      #   ), 1, 0),
      DV_MPH = round(DVTOTAL * 0.621371)
    ) 
  # %>%
  #   filter(KEEP == 1)
  


  # count all vehicles involved in all crashes in all years
  vehicle_count <<- vehicle_count + nrow(gv)
  ifelse(year == 2000, print(colnames(veh)), print(""))

  
  print(paste("gv + veh count:", nrow(veh)))
  
  # front temp
  veh_temp <- occ %>%
    inner_join(veh, by = c("PSU", "CASENO", "VEHNO", "RATWGT"))
  
  print(paste("veh + occ count:", nrow(veh_temp)))
  
  # front final
  front <- veh_temp %>%
    inner_join(accident, by = c("PSU", "CASENO", "RATWGT"))
  ifelse(year == 2000, print(colnames(front)), print(""))

      
  print(paste("accident + front count:", nrow(front)))
  
  return(front)
}

# Loop through years and process data
years <- 2000:2015
# years <- 2000
all_data <- lapply(years, process_year)
nhtsa_combined_df <- bind_rows(all_data)

# write nhtsa_combined_df to csv with vroom
vroom::vroom_write(nhtsa_combined_df, file = file.path("data", "nhtsa_combined_df_saved.csv"))

```

```{r clean and filter nhtsa dataframe}
# read nhtsa_combined_df.csv with vroom
nhtsa_combined_df <- vroom::vroom(file.path("data", "nhtsa_combined_df_saved.csv"))

# Final adjustments
nhtsa_combined_df <- nhtsa_combined_df %>%
  mutate(
    BACK = ifelse(BACK < 1, 0, BACK),
    NECK = ifelse(NECK < 1, 0, NECK),
    CONCUSSION = ifelse(CONCUSSION < 1, 0, CONCUSSION),
    AIS1 = ifelse(AIS1 < 1, 0, AIS1),
    OI = ifelse(OI < 1, 0, OI),
    # need to make sure this is catching the right group
    INJURED = ifelse(OI == 1 | MAIS > 0 | INJNUM > 0, 1, 0),
    SEX_BIN = ifelse(SEX == 1, "m", ifelse(SEX == 9, NA, "f")),
    # combine WEATHER and CLIMATE; they are the same but different years and coded differently
    WEATHER = ifelse(
      YEAR %in% c(2000:2006),
      WEATHER,
      ifelse(
        YEAR %in% c(2007:2015),
        CLIMATE,
        NA
      )
    ),
    # match WEATHER codes
    #     name           WEATHER  CLIMATE
    # no adverse conditions   0   18, 19 (cloudy)
    # rain                    1   12
    # sleet/hail              2   13 or 21
    # snow                    3   14 or 15
    # fog                     4   11
    # rain and fog            5   
    # sleet and fog           6   
    # other                   7   98
    # unknown                 .U  .U
    WEATHER = ifelse(
      WEATHER %in% c(18, 19), 0, 
      ifelse(
        WEATHER == 12, 1,
        ifelse(
          WEATHER %in% c(13, 20, 21), 2,
          ifelse(
            WEATHER == 14 | WEATHER == 15, 3,
            ifelse(
              WEATHER %in% c(98, 16), 7,
              ifelse(
                WEATHER == 11, 4,
                WEATHER
              )))))),
    # BODYTYPE values > 20 have no VEHWGT (as taken from VIN) so this pairs them with Gross Vehicle Weight Rating (GVWR) using WGTCDTR variable
    VEHWGT = ifelse(
      is.na(VEHWGT),
      WGTCDTR,
      VEHWGT
    ),
    # match WGTCDTR codes to weights
    VEHWGT = ifelse(
      VEHWGT == 1, 6000, 
      ifelse(
        VEHWGT == 2, 8000,
        ifelse(
          VEHWGT == 3, 12000,
          ifelse(
            VEHWGT == 4, 15000,
            ifelse(
              VEHWGT == 5, 17750,
              ifelse(
                VEHWGT == 6, 22750, 
                ifelse(
                  VEHWGT == 7, 29500,
                  ifelse(
                    VEHWGT == 8, 33000,
                    ifelse(
                      VEHWGT == 9, NA,
                      VEHWGT
                    ))))))))),
    DVEST_KPH = 
      ifelse(
        DVEST == 0, DVTOTAL,
        ifelse(
          DVEST == 1, 5,
          ifelse(
            DVEST == 2, 17,
            ifelse(
              DVEST == 3, 32,
              ifelse(
                DVEST == 4, 47,
                ifelse(
                  DVEST == 5, 62, NA
                )))))),
    DVEST_MPH = round(DVEST_KPH * 0.621371, digits = 0),
    BMI = round(BMI, digits = 0))


data_counts <- list()
criteria_list <- list()

data_counts <- c(
  data_counts,
  before_AGE = nrow(nhtsa_combined_df)
)
criteria_list <- c(
    criteria_list,
    before_AGE = paste0(
    "Count before AGE >= 20: ", 
    data_counts$before_AGE)
  )
print(
  criteria_list$before_AGE
  )
# filter out cases by in- and exclusion criteria
nhtsa_combined_df <- nhtsa_combined_df %>%
  filter(
    AGE >= 20
  )

data_counts <- c(
  data_counts,
  before_seatpos = nrow(nhtsa_combined_df)
)

criteria_list <- c(
    criteria_list,
    before_seatpos = paste0(
    "Count before SEATPOS %in% c(11, 13): ", 
    data_counts$before_seatpos)
  )
print(
  criteria_list$before_seatpos
  )

nhtsa_combined_df <- nhtsa_combined_df %>%
  filter(
    SEATPOS %in% c(11, 13)
  )

data_counts <- c(
  data_counts,
before_events = nrow(nhtsa_combined_df)
)

criteria_list <- c(
    criteria_list,
    before_events = paste0(
    "Count before EVENTS == 1: ", 
    data_counts$before_events)
  )
print(
  criteria_list$before_events
  )

nhtsa_combined_df <- nhtsa_combined_df %>%
  filter(
    # Front-left and front-right seats
    EVENTS == 1)

data_counts <- c(
  data_counts,
before_DOF1 = nrow(nhtsa_combined_df)
)

criteria_list <- c(
    criteria_list,
    before_DOF1 = paste0(
    "Count before DOF1 %in% c(1, 11, 12, 21, 31, 32, 41, 51, 52, 61, 71, 72, 81, 91, 92): ", 
    data_counts$before_DOF1)
  )
print(
  criteria_list$before_DOF1
  )

nhtsa_combined_df <- nhtsa_combined_df %>%
  filter(
    DOF1 %in% c(1, 11, 12, 21, 31, 32, 41, 51, 52, 61, 71, 72, 81, 91, 92)
    )
    
    # DVEST is in kph and categorized, but has fewer NAs than DVTOTAL

data_counts <- c(
  data_counts,
before_DVEST = nrow(nhtsa_combined_df)
)

criteria_list <- c(
    criteria_list,
    before_DVEST_MPH = paste0(
    "Count before DVEST_MPH >= ", min_DV_MPH, " & DVEST_MPH <= ", max_DV_MPH, ": ", 
    data_counts$before_DVEST_MPH)
  )
print(
  criteria_list$before_DVEST_MPH
  )

nhtsa_combined_df <- nhtsa_combined_df %>%
  filter(
    DVEST_MPH >= min_DV_MPH & DVEST_MPH <= max_DV_MPH
  )

data_counts <- c(
  data_counts,
before_BELTUSE_BIN = nrow(nhtsa_combined_df)
)

criteria_list <- c(
    criteria_list,
    before_BELTUSE_BIN = paste0(
    "Count before !is.na(BELTUSE_BIN): ", 
    data_counts$before_BELTUSE_BIN)
  )
print(
  criteria_list$before_BELTUSE_BIN
  )

nhtsa_combined_df <- nhtsa_combined_df %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(BELTUSE_BIN)
  )

data_counts <- c(
  data_counts,
before_BAGDEPLOY_BIN = nrow(nhtsa_combined_df)
)

criteria_list <- c(
    criteria_list,
    before_BAGDEPLOY_BIN = paste0(
    "Count before !is.na(BAGDEPLOY_BIN): ", 
    data_counts$before_BAGDEPLOY_BIN)
  )
print(
  criteria_list$before_BAGDEPLOY_BIN
  )

nhtsa_combined_df <- nhtsa_combined_df %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(BAGDEPLOY_BIN)
  )

data_counts <- c(
  data_counts,
before_CONCUSSION = nrow(nhtsa_combined_df)
)

criteria_list <- c(
    criteria_list,
    before_CONCUSSION = paste0(
    "Count before !is.na(CONCUSSION): ", 
    data_counts$before_CONCUSSION)
  )
print(
  criteria_list$before_CONCUSSION
  )

nhtsa_combined_df <- nhtsa_combined_df %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(CONCUSSION)
  )

data_counts <- c(
  data_counts,
  after_filters = nrow(nhtsa_combined_df)
)

criteria_list <- c(
    criteria_list,
    after_filters = paste0(
    "All entries all years after filters:", 
    data_counts$after_filters)
  )
print(
  criteria_list$after_filters
  )

# add categorical MAIS variable
nhtsa_combined_df <- nhtsa_combined_df %>%
  mutate(
    MAIS_cat = as.factor(MAIS),
    DV_MPH_BIN = as.factor(ifelse(DV_MPH <20, 0, 1))
  )

# add HIPR var from CONCUSSION for nhtsa project
nhtsa_combined_df <- nhtsa_combined_df %>%
  mutate(
    HIPR = CONCUSSION
  )

nhtsa_combined_df <- nhtsa_combined_df %>% 
  select(order(colnames(nhtsa_combined_df)))

# add unique ID numbers
nhtsa_combined_df <- nhtsa_combined_df %>%
  mutate(
    ID = row_number()
  )

# make appropriate variables into factors
cols_all <- sort(colnames(nhtsa_combined_df))
cols_factor <- c("BAGDEPLY", "BAGDEPLOY_BIN", "BELTUSE_BIN", "BMI_HIGH", "CONCUSSION", "DVEST", "HIPR", "ID", "INJURED", "MAIS", "MAIS_cat", "MANUSE", "OBJCONT1", "OBJCONT2", "OCCNO", "OI", "PSU", "PSUSTRAT", "ROLLOVER", "SEATPOS", "SEX_BIN", "VEHNO", "VEHTYPE", "YEAR", "ALCINV", "DEATH", "DRGINV", "MAKE", "WEATHER")
nhtsa_combined_df[cols_factor] <- lapply(nhtsa_combined_df[cols_factor], factor)

cols_explore <- c(cols_factor, "AGE", "BMI", "DV_MPH", "DVEST", "DVEST_MPH", "DVBASIS")

explore_df <- subset(nhtsa_combined_df, select = cols_explore)
explore_df$DVBASIS <- as.factor(explore_df$DVBASIS)
# add IND_ID var which is a unique identifier for each individual

# print criteria_list in- and exclusion counts
paste(criteria_list)

# explore data
summary(explore_df)

rm(explore_df)
```

```{r join MADYMO data}
# exclude NA values for some variables
# nhtsa_combined_df <- nhtsa_combined_df %>%
#   subset(
#     
#   )

# read MADYMO_df.csv with vroom
MADYMO_df <- vroom::vroom(file.path("data", "MADYMO_df.csv"))

# make all relevant variables correct datatypes
MADYMO_df$SEATPOS <- as.factor(MADYMO_df$SEATPOS)
MADYMO_df$BELTUSE_BIN <- as.factor(MADYMO_df$BELTUSE_BIN)
MADYMO_df$BAGDEPLOY_BIN <- as.factor(MADYMO_df$BAGDEPLOY_BIN)

# join MADYMO data to NHTSA dataframe
madymo_nhtsa_df <- nhtsa_combined_df %>%
  left_join(MADYMO_df, by = join_by(DV_MPH == DVTOTAL, SEATPOS == SEATPOS, BELTUSE_BIN == BELTUSE_BIN, BAGDEPLOY_BIN == BAGDEPLOY_BIN))

# get rid of environment items that are not needed
rm(
  MADYMO_df,
  nhtsa_combined_df
)

```

```{r vars into strings}
# replace weather numbers with strings
madymo_nhtsa_df$WEATHER <- as.character(madymo_nhtsa_df$WEATHER)
madymo_nhtsa_df$WEATHER[madymo_nhtsa_df$WEATHER == 0] <- "no adverse conditions"
madymo_nhtsa_df$WEATHER[madymo_nhtsa_df$WEATHER == 1] <- "rain"
madymo_nhtsa_df$WEATHER[madymo_nhtsa_df$WEATHER == 2] <- "sleet/hail"
madymo_nhtsa_df$WEATHER[madymo_nhtsa_df$WEATHER == 3] <- "snow"
madymo_nhtsa_df$WEATHER[madymo_nhtsa_df$WEATHER == 4] <- "fog"
madymo_nhtsa_df$WEATHER[madymo_nhtsa_df$WEATHER == 5] <- "rain and fog"
madymo_nhtsa_df$WEATHER[madymo_nhtsa_df$WEATHER == 6] <- "sleet and fog"
madymo_nhtsa_df$WEATHER[madymo_nhtsa_df$WEATHER == 7] <- "other"
madymo_nhtsa_df$WEATHER[madymo_nhtsa_df$WEATHER == 8] <- "unknown"


# replace vehicle type with strings
madymo_nhtsa_df$VEHTYPE <- as.character(madymo_nhtsa_df$VEHTYPE)
madymo_nhtsa_df$VEHTYPE[madymo_nhtsa_df$VEHTYPE == "P"] <- "passenger vehicle"
madymo_nhtsa_df$VEHTYPE[madymo_nhtsa_df$VEHTYPE == "T"] <- "truck"
madymo_nhtsa_df$VEHTYPE[madymo_nhtsa_df$VEHTYPE %in% c("U", 9)] <- "unknown/other"

# ALCINV to string
madymo_nhtsa_df$ALCINV <- as.character(madymo_nhtsa_df$ALCINV)
madymo_nhtsa_df$ALCINV[madymo_nhtsa_df$ALCINV == 1] <- "yes"
madymo_nhtsa_df$ALCINV[madymo_nhtsa_df$ALCINV == 2] <- "no"

# DRGINV to string
madymo_nhtsa_df$DRGINV <- as.character(madymo_nhtsa_df$DRGINV)
madymo_nhtsa_df$DRGINV[madymo_nhtsa_df$DRGINV == 1] <- "yes"
madymo_nhtsa_df$DRGINV[madymo_nhtsa_df$DRGINV == 2] <- "no"


# SEATPOS to string
madymo_nhtsa_df$SEATPOS <- as.character(madymo_nhtsa_df$SEATPOS)
madymo_nhtsa_df$SEATPOS[madymo_nhtsa_df$SEATPOS == 11] <- "driver"
madymo_nhtsa_df$SEATPOS[madymo_nhtsa_df$SEATPOS == 13] <- "passenger"

# categorize time into 5 levels
madymo_nhtsa_df <- madymo_nhtsa_df %>%
  mutate(
    TIME_cat = cut(
      TIME,
      breaks = c(0, 600, 1200, 1800, 2400),
      labels = c("night", "morning", "afternoon", "evening"),
      include.lowest = TRUE
    )
  )
```


```{r visualize HIC15 and DV_MPH relationship, eval=FALSE}

# scatterplot of HIC15_thousand (10,000 scale) and DV_MPH to see relationship
ggplot(madymo_nhtsa_df, aes(y = HIC15, x = DV_MPH)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(title = "Scatterplot of HIC15 and DV_MPH", y = "HIC15 (transformed)", x = "DV_MPH") + 
  # y axis to 65
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 60000))


# scatterplot of HIC15_sqrt and DV_MPH because above relationship was nonlinear
ggplot(madymo_nhtsa_df, aes(y = sqrt(HIC15), x = DV_MPH)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(title = "Scatterplot of sqrt(HIC15) and DV_MPH", y = "sqrt(HIC15) (transformed)", x = "DV_MPH") + 
  # y axis to 65
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 40))


# scatterplot of HIC15_log and DV_MPH because above relationship was nonlinear
ggplot(madymo_nhtsa_df, aes(y = log(HIC15), x = DV_MPH)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(title = "Scatterplot of log(HIC15) and DV_MPH", y = "log(HIC15) (transformed)", x = "DV_MPH") + 
  # y axis to 65
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 12)) +
  # draw regression line
  geom_smooth(method = "lm")
```

```{r add HIC15 transform vars}
# transform/scale HIC15 to see if numbers are more legible
madymo_nhtsa_df$HIC15_thousand <-
  madymo_nhtsa_df$HIC15/1000

# create log transformed HIC15
madymo_nhtsa_df$HIC15_log <- 
  log(madymo_nhtsa_df$HIC15)

# create sqrt transformed HIC15
madymo_nhtsa_df$HIC15_sqrt <- 
  sqrt(madymo_nhtsa_df$HIC15)
```

```{r print summary of relevant variables}
# before beginning resource-intensive multiple imputation, make sure to only keep relevant columns
columns_final <- c("ID", "HIPR", "BAGDEPLOY_BIN", "BELTUSE_BIN", "BMI", "SEATPOS", "SEX_BIN", "YEAR", "AGE", "HEIGHT", "WEIGHT", "DV_MPH", "DVEST_MPH", "BODYTYPE", "PSU", "PSUSTRAT", "RATWGT", "ALCINV", "DRGINV", "MAKE", "MODELYR", "VEHWGT", "WEATHER", "TIME", "TIME_cat", "VEHTYPE", "HIC15", "HIC15_log")

# select only relevant columns
madymo_nhtsa_df <- madymo_nhtsa_df %>%
  select(
    all_of(columns_final))

# print summary of relevant variables
summary(madymo_nhtsa_df)
```

```{r extreme variables}
# preserve madymo_nhtsa_df before removing extreme values
madymo_nhtsa_df_full <- madymo_nhtsa_df
# examine extreme values
extreme_values <- madymo_nhtsa_df %>%
  select_if(is.numeric) %>%
  gather(variable, value) %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  summarise(
    min = min(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    max = max(value, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(min)), desc(abs(max)))

# examine values
print(extreme_values, n = 23)

# create list of IDs with omittable values
extreme_value_ids <- c()

# MODELYR values all reasonable
# all MADYMO measurements come from simulation, not subject to incorrect input
# YEAR was inches before 1993, but this is not included in the dataset
# WEIGHT and HEIGHT were imperial (pounds and inches) before 1993, but that is not relevant for this dataset
# WEIGHT has maximum 150, all values above 150 are combined
# HEIGHT has maximum 220, all values over 200 are combined

# investigate BMI (instead of HEIGHT and WEIGHT separately - helps identify unusual values)
bmi_df <- madymo_nhtsa_df %>%
  filter(BMI < 10 | BMI > 70) %>%
  select(ID, YEAR, BMI, HEIGHT, WEIGHT, AGE)
# ID 858 has BMI 1.73 (height 170 cm, weight 5 kg, age 39) - probably a data entry error; can omit
extreme_value_ids <- c(
  extreme_value_ids,
  858
)
# ID 1902 and 9191 are 5.7 and 7.4 BMI, (heights 157, 168 and weights 14, 21 and ages 34, 47), unsure about these
extreme_value_ids <- c(
  extreme_value_ids,
  1902, 9191
)
# except ID 7553, all HEIGHTS with BMI > 100 appear to be input as inches (between 40 and 75). consider re-coding these
# re-code HEIGHT of IDs where BMI > 101 and HEIGHT < 75, from inches to cm
extreme_values_df <- madymo_nhtsa_df %>%
  filter(BMI > 101 & HEIGHT < 75) %>%
  mutate(HEIGHT = HEIGHT * 2.54) %>%
  select(ID, HEIGHT)
# copy new recoded values back to madymo_nhtsa_df
madymo_nhtsa_df <- madymo_nhtsa_df %>%
  rows_update(extreme_values_df, by = "ID") %>%
  # recalculate BMI with new HEIGHT values
  mutate(BMI = WEIGHT / ((HEIGHT / 100) ^ 2))

# delete HEIGHT and WEIGHT from madymo_nhtsa_df because BMI now is based on valid HEIGHT and WEIGHT values
madymo_nhtsa_df <- madymo_nhtsa_df %>%
  select(-HEIGHT, -WEIGHT)


# TIME values all expected, within 0001 and 2400

# investigate VEHWGT
# histogram of VEHWGT
ggplot(madymo_nhtsa_df, aes(x = VEHWGT)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 10) +
  labs(title = "Histogram of VEHWGT", x = "VEHWGT", y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal()
# examine extreme values
vehwgt_df <- madymo_nhtsa_df %>%
  filter(VEHWGT < 1000 | VEHWGT > 5000) %>%
  select(ID, VEHWGT, BODYTYPE)
# no non-zero weights below 1400; no non-9999 weights over 5177
# count of 9999 or 0 values:
vehwgt_extreme_df <- madymo_nhtsa_df %>%
  filter(VEHWGT %in% c(9999, 0)) %>%
  select(ID, VEHWGT, BODYTYPE) 
vehwgt_extreme_count <- nrow(vehwgt_extreme_df)
# count: 194
vehwgt_extreme_count / nrow(madymo_nhtsa_df) * 100
# 194 is 1.499% of dataset, therefore can be omitted
# add IDs to extreme_value_ids
extreme_value_ids <- c(
  extreme_value_ids,
  vehwgt_extreme_df$ID
)

# investigate AGE
# histogram of AGE
ggplot(madymo_nhtsa_df, aes(x = AGE)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1) +
  labs(title = "Histogram of AGE", x = "AGE", y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal()
# all values within 0 and 97 (max)

# exclude vars with normal ranges (can adjust which groups are added to the list; VEHWGT for example can be excluded)
madymo_nhtsa_df <- madymo_nhtsa_df %>%
  filter(!ID %in% extreme_value_ids)


# remove unnecessary items from environment
rm(
  extreme_value_ids,
  extreme_values_df,
  extreme_values,
  extreme_value_ids,
  vehwgt_df,
  vehwgt_extreme_df,
  vehwgt_extreme_count,
  bmi_df,
  explore_df
)
```

```{r functions for survey model evaluation}
# function to print and examine ROC curve, AUC, and other metrics
model_eval_fun <- function(formula = "HIPR ~ HIC15_log", data = madymo_nhtsa_df) {
  # Extract required components from survey design
 design <- svydesign(
    id = ~PSU,
    strata = ~PSUSTRAT,
    weights = ~RATWGT,
    data = data
  )
 
  model <- svyglm(
  as.formula(formula),
  design = design,
  family = quasibinomial
 )
  
  roc_data <- data.frame(
    y = design$variables$HIPR,
    phat = fitted(model),
    weights = design$variables$RATWGT
  )

  
  # Create weighted ROC object
  mycurve <- wroc(
    response.var = "y",
    phat.var = "phat",
    weights.var = "weights",
    data = roc_data,
    tag.event = levels(roc_data$y)[2],
    tag.nonevent = levels(roc_data$y)[1],
    cutoff.method = "Youden"
  )
  
  # Calculate prevalence of the event
  event_level <- levels(roc_data$y)[2]
  prevalence <- sum(roc_data$weights[roc_data$y == event_level]) / sum(roc_data$weights)
    
  # browser()
  
  # Extract performance metrics
  metrics_list <- list(
    AUC = mycurve$wauc,
    Optimal_Cutoff = mycurve$optimal.cutoff$cutoff.value,
    Sensitivity = mycurve$optimal.cutoff$Sew,
    Specificity = mycurve$optimal.cutoff$Spw,
    Correlation = cor(as.numeric(roc_data$y), roc_data$phat, use = "pairwise.complete.obs"),
    # get p-value and standard error for model (only HIC15_log)
    beta = summary(model)$coefficients[2, 1],
    p_value = summary(model)$coefficients[2, 4],
    se = summary(model)$coefficients[2, 2],
    Cases = mycurve$basics$n.event,
    Controls = mycurve$basics$n.nonevent
    # PPV - excluding because low prevalence makes PPV low
    # PPV = 100 * ((mycurve$optimal.cutoff$Sew * prevalence) / 
    #                ((mycurve$optimal.cutoff$Sew * prevalence) + 
    #                   ((1 - mycurve$optimal.cutoff$Spw) * (1 - prevalence))))
  )
  
  
  # Generate plot
  roc_plot <- wroc.plot(
    x = mycurve,
    print.auc = TRUE,
    print.cutoff = TRUE
  )
  
  # Return both plot and metrics
  return(list(
    mycurve = mycurve,
    metrics = metrics_list,
    model = model
  ))
}


# function to compare models in dataframe using loop
compare_df_fun <- function(models) {
  comparison_df <- data.frame()
  for (model in models) {
    # Extract the AUC and other metrics
    # β <- get(model)$model$coefficients
    auc <- get(model)$metrics$AUC
    optimal_cutoff <- get(model)$metrics$Optimal_Cutoff
    sensitivity <- get(model)$metrics$Sensitivity
    specificity <- get(model)$metrics$Specificity
    correlation <- get(model)$metrics$Correlation
    # get n.event from mycurve$basics 
    num_cases <- get(model)$metrics$Cases
    # count number of HIPR == 0
    num_controls <- get(model)$metrics$Controls
    p_value <- get(model)$metrics$p_value
    se <- get(model)$metrics$se
    beta <- get(model)$metrics$beta
    # PPV <- get(model)$metrics$PPV
    
    # browser()
    
    # Create a new row for the comparison dataframe
    new_row <- data.frame(
      Model = model,
      
      AUC = auc,
      Optimal_Cutoff = optimal_cutoff,
      # how to interpret results as cutoff of injury for HIC15
      # Optimal_Cutoff_log = (optimal_cutoff),
      Sensitivity = sensitivity,
      Specificity = specificity,
      Correlation = correlation,
      Cases = num_cases,
      Controls = num_controls,
      Beta = beta,
      SE = se,
      P_value = p_value
    )
    
    # Append the new row to the comparison dataframe
    comparison_df <- rbind(comparison_df, new_row)
  }
  return(comparison_df)
}
```

```{r compare extreme adjustments, eval=FALSE}
# create two models, one before extreme adjustment (madymo_nhtsa_df_full) and one after (updated madymo_nhtsa_df)
# use model_eval_fun function on both models to create ROC curves and AUC
model_eval_full <- model_eval_fun(
  formula = "HIPR ~ HIC15_log",
  data = madymo_nhtsa_df_full
)

model_eval_extreme_adjusted <- model_eval_fun(
  formula = "HIPR ~ HIC15_log",
  data = madymo_nhtsa_df
)

# compare model_eval_fun results
comp <- c(
  "model_eval_full",
  "model_eval_extreme_adjusted")

compare_df_fun(comp)
```

```{r examine missingness, eval=FALSE}
# examine missingness
missing_values <- madymo_nhtsa_df %>%
  summarise_all(~ sum(is.na(.))) %>%
  gather(variable, missing) %>%
  filter(missing > 0) %>%
  arrange(desc(missing))

print(missing_values)

# automatically select variables which are missing 5% or more as c()
missing_vars <- madymo_nhtsa_df %>%
  summarise_all(~ sum(is.na(.))) %>%
  gather(variable, missing) %>%
  filter(missing > nrow(madymo_nhtsa_df) * 0.05) %>%
  arrange(desc(missing)) %>%
  pull(variable)

# add HIC15_log to missing_vars for comparison
missing_vars <- c(
  missing_vars,
  "HIC15_log"
)


# examine randomness of all applicable variables
missing_results_df <- data.frame()
for (i in 1:(length(missing_vars) - 1)) {
  missing_test <- madymo_nhtsa_df %>%
    select("HIC15_log", missing_vars[i])
  # save datatype of variable
  var_type <- class(madymo_nhtsa_df[[missing_vars[i]]])
  print(paste("Missing test: ", missing_vars[i]))
  results <- na.test(
    missing_test,
  p.digits = 3, 
  digits = 3, 
  alpha = 0.05)
  # write results to dataframe missing_results_df
  missing_results_df <- rbind(
    missing_results_df,
    data.frame(
      Variable = missing_vars[i],
      Type = var_type,
      No.missing = results$result$little$no.incomplete,
      Test.stat.X2 = results$result$little$statistic,
      P_Value = results$result$little$pval,
      MCAR = ifelse(results$result$little$pval < 0.05, "No", "Yes")
    )
  )
}

# print results of tests
missing_results_df

# store variables that are MCAR
mcar_vars <- missing_results_df %>%
  filter(MCAR == "Yes") %>%
  pull(Variable)

# store variables that are not MCAR
not_mcar_cont_vars <- missing_results_df %>%
  filter(MCAR == "No" & Type == "numeric") %>%
  pull(Variable)


# use ggplot2::geom_miss_point() to examine missingness for all continuous variables in not_mcar_vars against HIC15_log
# create a list of ggplot objects
ggplot_list <- list()
for (i in 1:length(not_mcar_cont_vars)) {
  ggplot_list[[i]] <- ggplot(madymo_nhtsa_df, aes(x = HIC15_log, y = .data[[not_mcar_cont_vars[i]]])) +
    geom_miss_point() +
    labs(
      title = paste("Missingness for", not_mcar_cont_vars[i]), 
      x = "HIC15_log", 
      y = not_mcar_cont_vars[i]
    ) +
    theme_minimal()
}
# code is flexible for multiple variables, change ncol value for more graphs per line
grid.arrange(grobs = ggplot_list, ncol = 1)


# check for patterns in missingness with regression
# create a missingness indicator for all vars in missing_vars
for (i in 1:length(missing_vars)) {
  madymo_nhtsa_df[[paste0(missing_vars[i], "_missing")]] <- ifelse(is.na(madymo_nhtsa_df[[missing_vars[i]]]), 1, 0)
}

# reestablish survey design object with new missingness variables
survey_design <- svydesign(
  id = ~PSU,
  strata = ~PSUSTRAT,
  weights = ~RATWGT,
  data = madymo_nhtsa_df
)


# VEHWGT and BMI are significant in model (p < 0.05), however VEHWGT effect size is 0.0008 and BMI effect size is 0.0245.
# despite small effect sizes, significance indicates they should be imputed 
  
  
# check variables that are significant in model
# VEHWGT
# t.test(VEHWGT ~ WEATHER_missing, data = madymo_nhtsa_df)
# wilcox.test(VEHWGT ~ WEATHER_missing, data = madymo_nhtsa_df)

# BMI
# t.test(BMI ~ WEATHER_missing, data = madymo_nhtsa_df)
# wilcox.test(BMI ~ WEATHER_missing, data = madymo_nhtsa_df)

# test to check BMI compared to PSU
# cliff.delta(PSU ~ WEATHER_missing, data = madymo_nhtsa_df)


# fit logistic regression to predict missingness of BMI using several covariates to make sure no associations are missed
missing_model <- svyglm(
  BMI_missing ~ ALCINV + HIPR + SEX_BIN + AGE + DV_MPH + VEHWGT + BAGDEPLOY_BIN + BELTUSE_BIN, 
  data = madymo_nhtsa_df, 
  family = quasibinomial,
  design = survey_design)
summary(missing_model)
# model suggests that the more missing BMI is, the less alcohol is involved (makes sense that vitals would be taken more often if someone is arrested for DUI)
# THIS COUNTS AS BIAS - WRITE THIS IN THE REPORT!


# fit logistic regression to predict missingness of ALCINV
missing_model <- svyglm(
  ALCINV_missing ~ BMI + HIPR + SEX_BIN + AGE + DV_MPH + VEHWGT + BAGDEPLOY_BIN + BELTUSE_BIN, 
  data = madymo_nhtsa_df, 
  family = quasibinomial,
  design = survey_design)
summary(missing_model)
# no significance in this model, suggesting missing at random
```

```{r define kept columns}
columns_final <- c("ID", "HIPR", "BAGDEPLOY_BIN", "BELTUSE_BIN", "BMI", "SEATPOS", "SEX_BIN", "YEAR", "AGE", "DV_MPH", "DVEST_MPH", "PSU", "PSUSTRAT", "RATWGT", "ALCINV", "DRGINV", "MAKE", "MODELYR", "VEHWGT", "WEATHER", "TIME", "TIME_cat", "VEHTYPE", "HIC15", "HIC15_log")

# select only relevant columns
madymo_nhtsa_df <- madymo_nhtsa_df %>%
  select(
    all_of(columns_final))
```

```{r DV_MPH split categories}
# create BMI_low, DV_MPH_low, DV_MPH_cat_5, and DV_MPH_cat_10 variables in madymo_nhtsa_df
bmi_cutoff <- 30 # could be 32, better sens and spec, but fewer for splitting by DV_MPH in higher levels

madymo_nhtsa_df <- madymo_nhtsa_df %>%
  mutate(
    BMI_low = as.factor(ifelse(BMI < bmi_cutoff, 1, 0)),
    DV_MPH_low = as.factor(ifelse(DV_MPH < 20, 1, 0)),
    DV_MPH_cat_3 = as.factor(as.numeric(cut(DV_MPH, breaks = seq(min_DV_MPH, max_DV_MPH, by = 20), include.lowest = TRUE))),
    DV_MPH_cat_5 = as.factor(as.numeric(cut(DV_MPH, breaks = seq(min_DV_MPH, max_DV_MPH, by = 12), include.lowest = TRUE))),
    DV_MPH_cat_10 = as.factor(as.numeric(cut(DV_MPH, breaks = seq(min_DV_MPH, max_DV_MPH, by = 6), include.lowest = TRUE)))
  )






# FIND SPLIT POINTS BASED ON TOTAL NUMBER OF CASES BY DV_MPH into 3 categories






# visualize DV_MPH levels
# ggplot(madymo_nhtsa_df, aes(x = DV_MPH)) +
#   geom_histogram(binwidth = 2) +
#   labs(title = "Histogram of Delta V", x = "Delta V (mph)", y = "Count") +
#   theme_minimal()

```

```{r remove missing values listwise}
# remove all individuals who have any missing variables
madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise <- madymo_nhtsa_df %>%
  filter(complete.cases(.))

# check missingness
missing_values <- madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise %>%
  summarise_all(~ sum(is.na(.))) %>%
  gather(variable, missing) %>%
  filter(missing > 0) %>%
  arrange(desc(missing))
print(missing_values)

# remove unnecessary items from environment
rm(
  missing_values
)
```

```{r listwise models removed missings, eval=FALSE}
# univariate model
univariate_model_listwise <- model_eval_fun(
  formula = "HIPR ~ HIC15_log",
  data = madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise
)
summary(univariate_model_listwise$model)


# OCCUPANT VARIABLES model

# define occupant variables
occ_vars <- c("SEX_BIN", "AGE", "BMI")

# # stepwise multivariate regression model building; delete highest p-value from model until only significant variables remain
# multivariate_model_listwise_occ <- model_eval_fun(
#   formula = paste(
#     "HIPR ~", 
#     paste(
#       c("HIC15_log", occ_vars), collapse = " + ")),
#   data = madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise
# )
# summary(multivariate_model_listwise_occ$model)
# 
# # SEX_BIN is 1 in occ_vars, run model without that
# multivariate_model_listwise_occ <- model_eval_fun(
#   formula = paste(
#     "HIPR ~", 
#     paste(
#       c("HIC15_log", occ_vars[-1]), collapse = " + ")),
#   data = madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise
# )
# summary(multivariate_model_listwise_occ$model)

# AGE is 2 in occ_vars, run model without 1 and 2
multivariate_model_listwise_occ <- model_eval_fun(
  formula = paste(
    "HIPR ~", 
    paste(
      c("HIC15_log", occ_vars[c(-1, -2)]), collapse = " + ")),
data = madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise)
summary(multivariate_model_listwise_occ$model)


# ENVIRONMENT VARIABLES model

# define env_vars
env_vars <- c("WEATHER", "MAKE", "MODELYR", "VEHWGT", "TIME", "VEHTYPE")
# exclude MAKE from vars - too many levels, results in NaN p values because insufficient df
env_vars <- env_vars[-2]

# multivariate_model_listwise_env <- model_eval_fun(
#   formula = paste("HIPR ~ HIC15_log + ", paste(env_vars, collapse = " + ")),
#   data = madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise
# )
# summary(multivariate_model_listwise_env$model)
# 
# # remove MODELYR
# multivariate_model_listwise_env <- model_eval_fun(
#   formula = paste("HIPR ~ HIC15_log + ", paste(env_vars[-2], collapse = " + ")),
#   data = madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise
# )
# summary(multivariate_model_listwise_env$model)
# 
# # remove VEHWGT
# multivariate_model_listwise_env <- model_eval_fun(
#   formula = paste("HIPR ~ HIC15_log + ", paste(env_vars[c(-2, -3)], collapse = " + ")),
#   data = madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise
# )
# summary(multivariate_model_listwise_env$model)
# 
# # remove VEHTYPE
# multivariate_model_listwise_env <- model_eval_fun(
#   formula = paste("HIPR ~ HIC15_log + ", paste(env_vars[c(-2, -3, -5)], collapse = " + ")),
#   data = madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise
# )
# summary(multivariate_model_listwise_env$model)
# 
# # remove TIME
# multivariate_model_listwise_env <- model_eval_fun(
#   formula = paste("HIPR ~ HIC15_log + ", paste(env_vars[c(-2, -3, -4, -5)], collapse = " + ")),
#   data = madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise
# )
# summary(multivariate_model_listwise_env$model)


# # split weather by 6 or not-6
# madymo_nhtsa_df_sleetfog <- madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise %>%
#   filter(WEATHER == 6)
# # only 2 entries with sleetfog
# 
# # split weather by 6 or not-6
# madymo_nhtsa_df_not_sleetfog <- madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise %>%
#   filter(WEATHER != 6)


# models with sleetfog, without sleetfog
# multivariate_model_listwise_env_sleetfog <- model_eval_fun(
#   formula = paste(
#     "HIPR ~", 
#     paste(
#       c("HIC15_log", env_vars[c(-2, -3, -4, -5)]), collapse = " + ")),
#   data = madymo_nhtsa_df_sleetfog
# )
# summary(multivariate_model_listwise_env_sleetfog$model)

# impossible because only 2 entries


# compare_df_fun( <- model_eval_fun(
#   survey_design_listwise,
#   multivariate_model_listwise_env_sleetfog
# )


# multivariate_model_listwise_env_not_sleetfog <- model_eval_fun(
#   formula = paste(
#     "HIPR ~", 
#     paste(
#       c("HIC15_log", env_vars[c(-2, -3, -4, -5)]), collapse = " + ")),
#   data = madymo_nhtsa_df_not_sleetfog
# )
# summary(multivariate_model_listwise_env_not_sleetfog$model)
# 
# sleetfog_vs_full_model_comparison <- compare_df_fun(
#   c(
#     "multivariate_model_listwise_env",
#     "multivariate_model_listwise_env_not_sleetfog"
#   ))
# print(sleetfog_vs_full_model_comparison)



# BEGIN WEATHER6 SIGNFICANCE ANALYSIS
# 
# # the following significance is collaboration with deepseek to investigate appropriateness of including WEATHER == 6 in the final model because it is only 2 observations and they are very significant
# tidy_full <- tidy(multivariate_model_listwise_env$model)
# tidy_subset <- tidy(multivariate_model_listwise_env_not_sleetfog$model)
# 
# coef_compare <- merge(tidy_full, tidy_subset, by = "term", suffixes = c("_full", "_subset"))
# coef_compare[, c("term", "estimate_full", "estimate_subset", "std.error_full", "std.error_subset")]
# 
# tidy(multivariate_model_listwise_env$model) |> filter(term == "WEATHER6")
# # "The coefficient for WEATHER == 6 (β = 12.7, se = 1.04, p = 0.00000564) is based on only two observations and should be interpreted with extreme caution."

# END WEATHER6 SIGNFICANCE ANALYSIS



# remove WEATHER (now same as univariate)
multivariate_model_listwise_env <- model_eval_fun(
  formula = paste(
    "HIPR ~", 
    paste(
      c("HIC15_log", env_vars[c(-1, -2, -3, -4, -5)]), collapse = " + ")
  ),
  data = madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise
)




# SIMULATION VARIABLES model
sim_vars <- c("DV_MPH", "SEATPOS", "BELTUSE_BIN", "BAGDEPLOY_BIN")

# multivariate_model_listwise_sim <- model_eval_fun(
#   formula = paste("HIPR ~ HIC15_log + ", paste(sim_vars, collapse = " + ")),
#   data = madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise
# )
# summary(multivariate_model_listwise_sim$model)
# 
# # remove BAGDEPLOY_BIN
# multivariate_model_listwise_sim <- model_eval_fun(
#   formula = paste("HIPR ~ HIC15_log + ", paste(sim_vars[-4], collapse = " + ")),
#   data = madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise
# )
# summary(multivariate_model_listwise_sim$model)
# 
# remove SEATPOS
multivariate_model_listwise_sim <- model_eval_fun(
  formula = paste(
    "HIPR ~",
    paste(
      c("HIC15_log", sim_vars[c(-4, -2)]), collapse = " + ")),
  data = madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise
)
summary(multivariate_model_listwise_sim$model)
# 
# 
# 
# # FINAL MODEL
# 
# multivariate_model_listwise_final <- model_eval_fun(
#   formula = paste(
#     "HIPR ~", 
#     paste(
#       c("HIC15_log", occ_vars[c(-1, -2)], env_vars[c(-1, -2, -3, -4, -5)], sim_vars[c(-4, -2)]), collapse = " + ")),
#   data = madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise
# )
# summary(multivariate_model_listwise_final$model)

# BELTUSE becomes only marginally insignificant (0.6) when BMI is introduced. what does this mean??

# remove BELTUSE_BIN
multivariate_model_listwise_final <- model_eval_fun(
  formula = paste(
    "HIPR ~", 
    paste(
      c("HIC15_log", occ_vars[c(-1, -2)], env_vars[c(-1, -2, -3, -4, -5)], sim_vars[c(-4, -2, -3)]), collapse = " + ")),
  data = madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise
)
summary(multivariate_model_listwise_final$model)

# remaining covariates: BMI + DV_MPH


```

```{r visualize HIC15 risk curve, eval=FALSE}
# visualize HIC15 risk curve using multivariate_model_listwise_final$model using predicted values
# create a new dataframe with predicted values
predicted_df <- madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise %>%
  mutate(
    predicted = predict(multivariate_model_listwise_final$model, newdata = madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise, type = "response")
  )

#plot logistic regression curve
ggplot(predicted_df, aes(x=HIC15, y=predicted)) + 
  geom_point(alpha=.5) +
  stat_smooth(method="glm", se=FALSE, method.args = list(family=binomial))

# graph with left Y axis for HIC and the right one for injury risk, with the x axis for dV
# Assuming a linear transformation: HIC15 = prob * 1000 (adjust based on your data)
scaling_factor <- 60000  # Change this based on your HIC15 range

ggplot(predicted_df, aes(x = DV_MPH, y = predicted)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  stat_smooth(method = "glm", se = FALSE, method.args = list(family = binomial)) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "Injury Risk",
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~ . * scaling_factor, name = "HIC15")
  ) +
  labs(title = "HIC15 Risk Curve", x = "Delta V (mph)", y = "Injury Risk")
```

```{r compare non-imputed models, eval=FALSE}
# compare model_eval_fun results
comp <- c(
  "univariate_model_listwise",
  "multivariate_model_listwise_occ",
  "multivariate_model_listwise_env",
  "multivariate_model_listwise_sim",
  "multivariate_model_listwise_final")

models_listwise_comparison_df <- compare_df_fun(comp)
print(models_listwise_comparison_df)
```

```{r categories BMI and DV_MPH, eval=FALSE}
# create dataframe for examining BMI and DV_MPH
xtab_df <- madymo_nhtsa_df %>%
  group_by(BMI) %>%
  summarise(
    count = n(),
    HIPR_count = sum(HIPR == 1),
    HIPR_prevalence = HIPR_count / count,
    BMI_low = ifelse(BMI < 30, 1, 0),
    DV_MPH_low = ifelse(DV_MPH < 20, 1, 0),
    # cut DV_MPH into 10 mph bins starting at min_DV_MPH, ending at max_DV_MPH
    DV_MPH_cat_3 = cut(DV_MPH, breaks = seq(min_DV_MPH, max_DV_MPH, by = 20), include.lowest = TRUE),
    # cut DV_MPH into 10 mph bins starting at min_DV_MPH, ending at max_DV_MPH
    DV_MPH_cat_5 = cut(DV_MPH, breaks = seq(min_DV_MPH, max_DV_MPH, by = 12), include.lowest = TRUE),
    # cut DV_MPH into min_DV_MPH mph bins starting at min_DV_MPH, ending at max_DV_MPH
    DV_MPH_cat_10 = cut(DV_MPH, breaks = seq(min_DV_MPH, max_DV_MPH, by = 6), include.lowest = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(HIPR_prevalence))

# visualize HIPR_prevalence
ggplot(xtab_df, aes(x = DV_MPH_cat_10, y = HIPR_prevalence)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  labs(title = "HIPR Prevalence by Delta V", x = "Delta V (mph)", y = "HIPR Prevalence") +
  theme_minimal()


# visualize BMI levels
ggplot(madymo_nhtsa_df, aes(x = BMI)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1) +
  labs(title = "Histogram of BMI", x = "BMI", y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal()


# cross tab for BMI (<30>) and DV_MPH (<20>) 
xtab_df_dv_low <- xtabs(
  ~ BMI_low + DV_MPH_low,
  data = xtab_df
)
print(xtab_df_dv_low)

# cross tab for BMI (<30>) and DV_MPH (3 levels) 
xtab_df_dv_3 <- xtabs(
  ~ BMI_low + DV_MPH_cat_3,
  data = xtab_df
)
print(xtab_df_dv_3)

# cross tab for BMI (<30>) and DV_MPH (5 levels) 
xtab_df_dv_5 <- xtabs(
  ~ BMI_low + DV_MPH_cat_5,
  data = xtab_df
)
print(xtab_df_dv_5)

# cross tab for BMI (<30>) and DV_MPH (10 levels) 
xtab_df_dv_10 <- xtabs(
  ~ BMI_low + DV_MPH_cat_10,
  data = xtab_df
)
print(xtab_df_dv_10)


```

```{r BMI levels, eval=FALSE}
# stratified analysis with BMI < 29 
bmi_fit_underweight_29 <- model_eval_fun(
  formula = paste(
    "HIPR ~", 
    paste(
      c("HIC15_log", occ_vars[c(-1, -2)], env_vars[c(-1, -2, -3, -4, -5)], sim_vars[c(-4, -2, -3)]), collapse = " + ")),
  data = subset(madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise, BMI < 29)
)
summary(bmi_fit_underweight_29$model)

# stratified analysis with BMI >= 29
bmi_fit_overweight_29 <- model_eval_fun(
  formula = paste(
    "HIPR ~", 
    paste(
      c("HIC15_log", occ_vars[c(-1, -2)], env_vars[c(-1, -2, -3, -4, -5)], sim_vars[c(-4, -2, -3)]), collapse = " + ")),
  data = subset(madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise, BMI >= 29)
)
summary(bmi_fit_overweight_29$model)


# stratified analysis with BMI < 30 
bmi_fit_underweight_30 <- model_eval_fun(
  formula = paste(
    "HIPR ~", 
    paste(
      c("HIC15_log", occ_vars[c(-1, -2)], env_vars[c(-1, -2, -3, -4, -5)], sim_vars[c(-4, -2, -3)]), collapse = " + ")),
  data = subset(madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise, BMI < 30)
)
summary(bmi_fit_underweight_30$model)

# stratified analysis with BMI >= 30
bmi_fit_overweight_30 <- model_eval_fun(
  formula = paste(
    "HIPR ~", 
    paste(
      c("HIC15_log", occ_vars[c(-1, -2)], env_vars[c(-1, -2, -3, -4, -5)], sim_vars[c(-4, -2, -3)]), collapse = " + ")),
  data = subset(madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise, BMI >= 30)
)
summary(bmi_fit_overweight_30$model)


# stratified analysis with BMI < 32 
bmi_fit_underweight_32 <- model_eval_fun(
  formula = paste(
    "HIPR ~", 
    paste(
      c("HIC15_log", occ_vars[c(-1, -2)], env_vars[c(-1, -2, -3, -4, -5)], sim_vars[c(-4, -2, -3)]), collapse = " + ")),
  data = subset(madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise, BMI < 32)
)
summary(bmi_fit_underweight_32$model)

# stratified analysis with BMI >= 32 
bmi_fit_overweight_32 <- model_eval_fun(
  formula = paste(
    "HIPR ~", 
    paste(
      c("HIC15_log", occ_vars[c(-1, -2)], env_vars[c(-1, -2, -3, -4, -5)], sim_vars[c(-4, -2, -3)]), collapse = " + ")),
  data = subset(madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise, BMI >= 32)
)
summary(bmi_fit_overweight_32$model)


comp_bmi <- c(
  "bmi_fit_underweight_29",
  "bmi_fit_overweight_29",
  "bmi_fit_underweight_30",
  "bmi_fit_overweight_30",
  "bmi_fit_underweight_32",
  "bmi_fit_overweight_32")

bmi_comparison_df <- compare_df_fun(comp_bmi)
print(bmi_comparison_df)

```

```{r delta V levels, eval=FALSE}
# visualize cases per DVEST_MPH
ggplot(madymo_nhtsa_df, aes(x = DV_MPH)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 2) +
  labs(title = "Histogram of Delta V", x = "Delta V (mph)", y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal()


# stratified analysis with DV < 9 
fit_dv_under_9 <- model_eval_fun(
  formula = paste(
    "HIPR ~", 
    paste(
      c("HIC15_log", occ_vars[c(-1, -2)], env_vars[c(-1, -2, -3, -4, -5)], sim_vars[c(-4, -2, -3)]), collapse = " + ")),
  data = subset(madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise, DV_MPH < 12)
)
summary(fit_dv_under_9$model)

# stratified analysis with DV >= 9
fit_dv_over_9 <- model_eval_fun(
  formula = paste(
    "HIPR ~", 
    paste(
      c("HIC15_log", occ_vars[c(-1, -2)], env_vars[c(-1, -2, -3, -4, -5)], sim_vars[c(-4, -2, -3)]), collapse = " + ")),
  data = subset(madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise, DV_MPH >= 9)
)
summary(fit_dv_over_9$model)


# stratified analysis with DV < 9 
fit_dv_9_to_14 <- model_eval_fun(
  formula = paste(
    "HIPR ~", 
    paste(
      c("HIC15_log", occ_vars[c(-1, -2)], env_vars[c(-1, -2, -3, -4, -5)], sim_vars[c(-4, -2, -3)]), collapse = " + ")),
  data = subset(madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise, DV_MPH >= 9 & DV_MPH < 14)
)
summary(fit_dv_9_to_14$model)

# stratified analysis with DV >= 9
fit_dv_over_9 <- model_eval_fun(
  formula = paste(
    "HIPR ~", 
    paste(
      c("HIC15_log", occ_vars[c(-1, -2)], env_vars[c(-1, -2, -3, -4, -5)], sim_vars[c(-4, -2, -3)]), collapse = " + ")),
  data = subset(madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise, DV_MPH >= 9)
)
summary(fit_dv_over_9$model)


# stratified analysis with DV < 15 
fit_dv_under_15 <- model_eval_fun(
  formula = paste(
    "HIPR ~", 
    paste(
      c("HIC15_log", occ_vars[c(-1, -2)], env_vars[c(-1, -2, -3, -4, -5)], sim_vars[c(-4, -2, -3)]), collapse = " + ")),
  data = subset(madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise, DV_MPH < 15)
)
summary(fit_dv_under_15$model)

# stratified analysis with DV >= 15
fit_dv_over_15 <- model_eval_fun(
  formula = paste(
    "HIPR ~", 
    paste(
      c("HIC15_log", occ_vars[c(-1, -2)], env_vars[c(-1, -2, -3, -4, -5)], sim_vars[c(-4, -2, -3)]), collapse = " + ")),
  data = subset(madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise, DV_MPH >= 15)
)
summary(fit_dv_over_15$model)


# stratified analysis with DV < 30 
fit_dv_under_30 <- model_eval_fun(
  formula = paste(
    "HIPR ~", 
    paste(
      c("HIC15_log", occ_vars[c(-1, -2)], env_vars[c(-1, -2, -3, -4, -5)], sim_vars[c(-4, -2, -3)]), collapse = " + ")),
  data = subset(madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise, DV_MPH < 30)
)
summary(fit_dv_under_30$model)

# stratified analysis with DV >= 30
fit_dv_over_30 <- model_eval_fun(
  formula = paste(
    "HIPR ~", 
    paste(
      c("HIC15_log", occ_vars[c(-1, -2)], env_vars[c(-1, -2, -3, -4, -5)], sim_vars[c(-4, -2, -3)]), collapse = " + ")),
  data = subset(madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise, DV_MPH >= 30)
)
summary(fit_dv_over_30$model)






comp_bmi <- c(
  "bmi_fit_underweight_29",
  "bmi_fit_overweight_29",
  "bmi_fit_dv_under_30",
  "bmi_fit_dv_over_30",
  "bmi_fit_underweight_32",
  "bmi_fit_overweight_32")

bmi_comparison_df <- compare_df_fun(comp_bmi)
print(bmi_comparison_df)

```

```{r delta V xtiles, eval=FALSE}
# create xtiles, quartiles, and quintiles for DV_MPH, even spread across all individuals
madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise <- madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise %>%
  mutate(
    DVEST_MPH_tertile = ntile(DVEST_MPH, 3),
    DVEST_MPH_quartile = ntile(DVEST_MPH, 4),
    DVEST_MPH_quintile = ntile(DVEST_MPH, 5),
    BMI_tertile = ntile(BMI, 3)
  )

# check xtiles
xtab_df_dv_tertile <- xtabs(
  ~  BMI_low + DVEST_MPH_tertile,
  data = madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise
)
print(xtab_df_dv_tertile)

xtab_df_dv_quartile <- xtabs(
  ~ BMI_low + DVEST_MPH_quartile,
  data = madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise
)
print(xtab_df_dv_quartile)

xtab_df_dv_quintile <- xtabs(
  ~ BMI_low + DVEST_MPH_quintile,
  data = madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise
)
print(xtab_df_dv_quintile)

# list minima and maxima of each DVEST tertile
DVEST_tertile_min_max <- madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise %>%
  group_by(DVEST_MPH_tertile) %>%
  summarise(
    min = min(DVEST_MPH),
    max = max(DVEST_MPH)
  )
print(DVEST_tertile_min_max)

# list minima and maxima of each BMI tertile
BMI_tertile_min_max <- madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise %>%
  group_by(BMI_tertile) %>%
  summarise(
    min = round(min(BMI)),
    max = round(max(BMI))
  )
print(BMI_tertile_min_max)

quartile_min_max <- madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise %>%
  group_by(DVEST_MPH_quartile) %>%
  summarise(
    min = min(DVEST_MPH),
    max = max(DVEST_MPH)
  )
print(quartile_min_max)

quintile_min_max <- madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise %>%
  group_by(DVEST_MPH_quintile) %>%
  summarise(
    min = min(DVEST_MPH),
    max = max(DVEST_MPH)
  )
print(quintile_min_max)
```

```{r delta V xtiles by cases}
# make xtiles of DV_MPH for only those with HIPR == 1
madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise_hipr <- madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise %>%
  filter(HIPR == 1) %>%
  mutate(
    DVEST_MPH_tertile_case = ntile(DVEST_MPH, 3),
    DVEST_MPH_quartile_case = ntile(DVEST_MPH, 4),
    DVEST_MPH_quintile_case = ntile(DVEST_MPH, 5)
  )


# list minima and maxima of each tertile
tertile_min_max_case <- madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise_hipr %>%
  group_by(DVEST_MPH_tertile_case) %>%
  summarise(
    min = min(DVEST_MPH),
    max = max(DVEST_MPH)
  )

tertile_case_mins <- tertile_min_max_case %>% pull(2)

# add tertile_min_max_case to madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise
madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise <- madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise %>%
  mutate(
    DVEST_MPH_tertile_case = as.factor(case_when(
      DVEST_MPH < tertile_case_mins[2] ~ 1,
      DVEST_MPH >= tertile_case_mins[2] & DVEST_MPH < tertile_case_mins[3] ~ 2,
      DVEST_MPH > tertile_case_mins[3] ~ 3
    )
    )
  )


# list minima and maxima of each quartile
quartile_min_max_case <- madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise_hipr %>%
  group_by(DVEST_MPH_quartile_case) %>%
  summarise(
    min = min(DVEST_MPH),
    max = max(DVEST_MPH)
  )

quartile_case_mins <- quartile_min_max_case %>% pull(2)

# add quartile_min_max_case to madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise
madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise <- madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise %>%
  mutate(
    DVEST_MPH_quartile_case = as.factor(case_when(
      DVEST_MPH < quartile_case_mins[2] ~ 1,
      DVEST_MPH >= quartile_case_mins[2] & DVEST_MPH < quartile_case_mins[3] ~ 2,
      DVEST_MPH >= quartile_case_mins[3] & DVEST_MPH < quartile_case_mins[4] ~ 3,
      DVEST_MPH >= quartile_case_mins[4] ~ 4
    )
  )
  )

# check quartiles
xtab_df_dv_quartile_case <- xtabs(
  ~  BMI_low + DVEST_MPH_quartile_case,
  data = madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise_hipr
)

# list minima and maxima of each quartile
quintile_min_max_case <- madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise_hipr %>%
  group_by(DVEST_MPH_quintile_case) %>%
  summarise(
    min = min(DVEST_MPH),
    max = max(DVEST_MPH)
  )

quintile_case_mins <- quintile_min_max_case %>% pull(2)

# add quintile_min_max_case to madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise
madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise <- madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise %>%
  mutate(
    DVEST_MPH_quintile_case = as.factor(case_when(
      DVEST_MPH < quintile_case_mins[2] ~ 1,
      DVEST_MPH >= quintile_case_mins[2] & DVEST_MPH < quintile_case_mins[3] ~ 2,
      DVEST_MPH >= quintile_case_mins[3] & DVEST_MPH < quintile_case_mins[4] ~ 3,
      DVEST_MPH >= quintile_case_mins[4] & DVEST_MPH < quintile_case_mins[5] ~ 4,
      DVEST_MPH >= quintile_case_mins[5] ~ 5
    )
  )
  )
```

```{r AUC grid function (fig 2)}
roc_grid_fun <- function(models_obj, col_num = 3) {
  
  model_names <- names(models_obj)
  
  # Extract data from each model object
  roc_df <- imap_dfr(models_obj, function(model, model_name) {
    # Extract ROC curve info from wroc object
    wroc_data <- model$mycurve$wroc.curve
    
    # Extract correlation and other values for display on side
    beta <- model$metrics$beta
    # r_value <- model$metrics$Correlation
    AUC <- model$metrics$AUC
    SE <- model$metrics$se
    P_value <- model$metrics$p_value
    cases <- model$metrics$Cases
    Controls <- model$metrics$Controls
    
    # browser()
    
    tibble(
      FPR = 1 - wroc_data$Spw.values,  # 1 - Specificity
      TPR = wroc_data$Sew.values,      # Sensitivity
      Model = model_name,
      AUC = AUC,
      # Optimal_Cutoff = optimal_cutoff,
      Beta = beta,
      SE = SE,
      P_value = P_value,
      Cases = cases,
      Controls = Controls
      # Correlation = r_value
    )
  })
  
    
  # preserve order of models (don't get alphabetized by summarise
  roc_df <- roc_df %>%
    mutate(Model = factor(Model, levels = model_names))
  
  
  # Get unique correlation per model for annotation, next line p-value
  label_df <- roc_df %>%
    group_by(Model) %>%
    # summarize to get unique values for Correlation and AUC
    summarise(
      # Correlation = first(Correlation),
      Cases = first(Cases),
      Beta = first(Beta),
      AUC = first(AUC),
      # Optimal_Cutoff = first(Optimal_Cutoff),
      SE = first(SE),
      P_value = first(P_value),
      Cases = first(Cases),
      Controls = first(Controls)
    ) %>%
    mutate(label = paste0("Cases = ", Cases,
                          "\nControls = ", Controls, 
                          "\nAUC = ", round(AUC, 2),
                          "\nBeta = ", round(Beta, 2),
                          "\nSE = ", round(SE, 2), 
                          "\nP-value = ", format_p(P_value)
                          # "\nOptimal Cutoff = ", round(Optimal_Cutoff, 2),
                          # "\n\nr = ", round(Correlation, 2)
    )
    )
  
  # Plot curves
  ggplot(roc_df, aes(x = FPR, y = TPR)) +
    geom_line(color = "blue", linewidth = 1) +
    geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey") +
    facet_wrap(~ Model, ncol = col_num) +
    geom_text(
      data = label_df,
      aes(x = 0.75, y = 0.3, label = label),  # Adjust position if needed
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      size = 3,
      hjust = 0
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(
      title = "ROC Curves by Model",
      x = "1 - Specificity (False Positive Rate)",
      y = "Sensitivity (True Positive Rate)"
    )
}
```

```{r AUC grid example, eval=FALSE}
# Step 1: Named list of main model objects
model_objs_listwise_stepwise <- list(
  "Univariate" = univariate_model_listwise,
  "Occupant Variables" = multivariate_model_listwise_occ,
  "Environment Variables" = multivariate_model_listwise_env,
  "Simulation Variables" = multivariate_model_listwise_sim,
  "Final Model" = multivariate_model_listwise_final
)

roc_grid_fun(model_objs_listwise_stepwise, col_num = 2)
```

```{r AUC grid model build, eval=FALSE}
# NOW DEFUNCT - FOLLOWING BLOCK HAS SCALABLE FORMULA VERSION OF THIS CODE

# AUC_grid_subset_rules_DV_tertile <- list(
#   AUC_grid_DV31_BMIlow = "DV_MPH_tertile == 1 & BMI_low == 1",
#   AUC_grid_DV32_BMIlow = "DV_MPH_tertile == 2 & BMI_low == 1",
#   AUC_grid_DV33_BMIlow = "DV_MPH_tertile == 3 & BMI_low == 1",
#   AUC_grid_DV31_BMIhigh = "DVEST_MPH_tertile == 1 & BMI_low == 0",
#   AUC_grid_DV32_BMIhigh = "DVEST_MPH_tertile == 2 & BMI_low == 0",
#   AUC_grid_DV33_BMIhigh = "DVEST_MPH_tertile == 3 & BMI_low == 0"
# )

roc_grid_given_xtile_fun <- function(
    df = madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise, 
    vars = c(DVEST_MPH, BMI), 
    num_levels = c(3, 3)) {
temp_df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    DVEST_MPH_xtile = as.factor(ntile(DVEST_MPH, 3)),
    BMI_xtile = as.factor(ntile(BMI, 3))
  )

# list minima and maxima of each DV xtile
DVEST_MPH_xtile_min_max <- madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise %>%
  group_by(DVEST_MPH_tertile) %>%
  summarise(
    min = min(DVEST_MPH),
    max = max(DVEST_MPH)
  )
# list minima and maxima of each BMI xtile
BMI_xtile_min_max <- madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise %>%
  group_by(BMI_tertile) %>%
  summarise(
    min = min(BMI),
    max = max(BMI)
  )
}



# verbose but effectively flexible build of tertile model - will adjust titles of each graph based on ranges determined in tertiling process
AUC_grid_subset_rules_DV_and_BMI_tertile <- list()
AUC_grid_subset_rules_DV_and_BMI_tertile[[paste0(
  "DV ", DV_tertile_min_max$min[1], "-", DV_tertile_min_max$max[1], 
  ", BMI ", BMI_tertile_min_max$min[1], "-", BMI_tertile_min_max$max[1])]] <-
  "DVEST_MPH_tertile == 1 & BMI_tertile == 1"

AUC_grid_subset_rules_DV_and_BMI_tertile[[paste0(
  "DV ", DV_tertile_min_max$min[2], "-", DV_tertile_min_max$max[2], 
  ", BMI ", BMI_tertile_min_max$min[1], "-", BMI_tertile_min_max$max[1])]] <-
  "DVEST_MPH_tertile == 2 & BMI_tertile == 1"

AUC_grid_subset_rules_DV_and_BMI_tertile[[paste0(
  "DV ", DV_tertile_min_max$min[3], "-", DV_tertile_min_max$max[3], 
  ", BMI ", BMI_tertile_min_max$min[1], "-", BMI_tertile_min_max$max[1])]] <-
  "DVEST_MPH_tertile == 3 & BMI_tertile == 1"

AUC_grid_subset_rules_DV_and_BMI_tertile[[paste0(
  "All DV",
  ", BMI ", BMI_tertile_min_max$min[1], "-", BMI_tertile_min_max$max[1])]] <-
  "BMI_tertile == 1"


AUC_grid_subset_rules_DV_and_BMI_tertile[[paste0(
  "DV ", DV_tertile_min_max$min[1], "-", DV_tertile_min_max$max[1], 
  ", BMI ", BMI_tertile_min_max$min[2], "-", BMI_tertile_min_max$max[2])]] <-
  "DVEST_MPH_tertile == 1 & BMI_tertile == 2"

AUC_grid_subset_rules_DV_and_BMI_tertile[[paste0(
  "DV ", DV_tertile_min_max$min[2], "-", DV_tertile_min_max$max[2], 
  ", BMI ", BMI_tertile_min_max$min[2], "-", BMI_tertile_min_max$max[2])]] <-
  "DVEST_MPH_tertile == 2 & BMI_tertile == 2"

AUC_grid_subset_rules_DV_and_BMI_tertile[[paste0(
  "DV ", DV_tertile_min_max$min[3], "-", DV_tertile_min_max$max[3], 
  ", BMI ", BMI_tertile_min_max$min[2], "-", BMI_tertile_min_max$max[2])]] <-
  "DVEST_MPH_tertile == 3 & BMI_tertile == 2"

AUC_grid_subset_rules_DV_and_BMI_tertile[[paste0(
  "All DV",
  ", BMI ", BMI_tertile_min_max$min[2], "-", BMI_tertile_min_max$max[2])]] <-
  "BMI_tertile == 2"


AUC_grid_subset_rules_DV_and_BMI_tertile[[paste0(
  "DV ", DV_tertile_min_max$min[1], "-", DV_tertile_min_max$max[1], 
  ", BMI ", BMI_tertile_min_max$min[3], "-", BMI_tertile_min_max$max[3])]] <-
  "DVEST_MPH_tertile == 1 & BMI_tertile == 3"

AUC_grid_subset_rules_DV_and_BMI_tertile[[paste0(
  "DV ", DV_tertile_min_max$min[2], "-", DV_tertile_min_max$max[2], 
  ", BMI ", BMI_tertile_min_max$min[3], "-", BMI_tertile_min_max$max[3])]] <-
  "DVEST_MPH_tertile == 2 & BMI_tertile == 3"

AUC_grid_subset_rules_DV_and_BMI_tertile[[paste0(
  "DV ", DV_tertile_min_max$min[3], "-", DV_tertile_min_max$max[3], 
  ", BMI ", BMI_tertile_min_max$min[3], "-", BMI_tertile_min_max$max[3])]] <-
  "DVEST_MPH_tertile == 3 & BMI_tertile == 3"

AUC_grid_subset_rules_DV_and_BMI_tertile[[paste0(
  "All DV",
  ", BMI ", BMI_tertile_min_max$min[3], "-", BMI_tertile_min_max$max[3])]] <-
  "BMI_tertile == 3"


AUC_grid_subset_rules_DV_and_BMI_tertile[[paste0(
  "DV ", DV_tertile_min_max$min[1], "-", DV_tertile_min_max$max[1],
  ", All BMI")]] <- 
  "DVEST_MPH_tertile == 1"

AUC_grid_subset_rules_DV_and_BMI_tertile[[paste0(
  "DV ", DV_tertile_min_max$min[2], "-", DV_tertile_min_max$max[2],
  ", All BMI")]] <- 
  "DVEST_MPH_tertile == 2"

AUC_grid_subset_rules_DV_and_BMI_tertile[[paste0(
  "DV ", DV_tertile_min_max$min[3], "-", DV_tertile_min_max$max[3],
  ", All BMI")]] <- 
  "DVEST_MPH_tertile == 3"

AUC_grid_subset_rules_DV_and_BMI_tertile[[paste0(
  "All DV",
  ", All BMI")]] <- 
  # need something here to satisfy logical argument requirement of function
  paste0("DVEST_MPH_tertile %in% c(", 
         madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise$DVEST_MPH_tertile[1],
         ":", madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise$DVEST_MPH_tertile[
           length(madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise$DVEST_MPH_tertile)], ")")


  # "All DV, BMI 1" = "BMI_tertile == 1",
  # "DV 1, BMI 2" = "DVEST_MPH_tertile == 1 & BMI_tertile == 2",
  # "DV 2, BMI 2" = "DVEST_MPH_tertile == 2 & BMI_tertile == 2",
  # "DV 3, BMI 2" = "DVEST_MPH_tertile == 3 & BMI_tertile == 2",
  # "All DV, BMI 2" = "BMI_tertile == 2",
  # "DV 1, BMI 3" = "DVEST_MPH_tertile == 1 & BMI_tertile == 3",
  # "DV 2, BMI 3" = "DVEST_MPH_tertile == 2 & BMI_tertile == 3",
  # "DV 3, BMI 3" = "DVEST_MPH_tertile == 3 & BMI_tertile == 3",
  # "All DV, BMI 3" = "BMI_tertile == 3"


# AUC_grid_subset_rules_quartile <- list(
#   AUC_grid_DV41_BMIlow = "DVEST_MPH_quartile == 1 & BMI_low == 1",
#   AUC_grid_DV42_BMIlow = "DVEST_MPH_quartile == 2 & BMI_low == 1",
#   AUC_grid_DV43_BMIlow = "DVEST_MPH_quartile == 3 & BMI_low == 1",
#   AUC_grid_DV44_BMIlow = "DVEST_MPH_quartile == 4 & BMI_low == 1",
#   AUC_grid_DV41_BMIhigh = "DVEST_MPH_quartile == 1 & BMI_low == 0",
#   AUC_grid_DV42_BMIhigh = "DVEST_MPH_quartile == 2 & BMI_low == 0",
#   AUC_grid_DV43_BMIhigh = "DVEST_MPH_quartile == 3 & BMI_low == 0",
#   AUC_grid_DV44_BMIhigh = "DVEST_MPH_quartile == 4 & BMI_low == 0"
# )
# 
# AUC_grid_subset_rules_quintile <- list(
#   AUC_grid_DV51_BMIlow = "DVEST_MPH_quintile == 1 & BMI_low == 1",
#   AUC_grid_DV52_BMIlow = "DVEST_MPH_quintile == 2 & BMI_low == 1",
#   AUC_grid_DV53_BMIlow = "DVEST_MPH_quintile == 3 & BMI_low == 1",
#   AUC_grid_DV54_BMIlow = "DVEST_MPH_quintile == 4 & BMI_low == 1",
#   AUC_grid_DV55_BMIlow = "DVEST_MPH_quintile == 5 & BMI_low == 1",
#   AUC_grid_DV51_BMIhigh = "DVEST_MPH_quintile == 1 & BMI_low == 0",
#   AUC_grid_DV52_BMIhigh = "DVEST_MPH_quintile == 2 & BMI_low == 0",
#   AUC_grid_DV53_BMIhigh = "DVEST_MPH_quintile == 3 & BMI_low == 0",
#   AUC_grid_DV54_BMIhigh = "DVEST_MPH_quintile == 4 & BMI_low == 0",
#   AUC_grid_DV55_BMIhigh = "DVEST_MPH_quintile == 5 & BMI_low == 0"
# )

# # with DV tertiles
# AUC_grid_models_tertile <- lapply(names(AUC_grid_subset_rules_DV_tertile), function(name) {
#   print(AUC_grid_subset_rules_DV_tertile[[name]])
#   rule <- AUC_grid_subset_rules_DV_tertile[[name]]
#   model_eval_fun(
#     formula = "HIPR ~ HIC15_log",
#     data = subset(madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise, eval(parse(text = rule)))
#   )
# })
# names(AUC_grid_models_tertile) <- names(AUC_grid_subset_rules_DV_tertile)
# 
# print(xtab_df_dv_tertile)

# with BMI and DV tertiles
AUC_grid_models_DV_and_BMI_tertile <- lapply(names(AUC_grid_subset_rules_DV_and_BMI_tertile), function(name) {
  print(AUC_grid_subset_rules_DV_and_BMI_tertile[[name]])
  rule <- AUC_grid_subset_rules_DV_and_BMI_tertile[[name]]
  model_eval_fun(
    formula = "HIPR ~ HIC15_log",
    data = subset(madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise, eval(parse(text = rule)))
  )
})
names(AUC_grid_models_DV_and_BMI_tertile) <- names(AUC_grid_subset_rules_DV_and_BMI_tertile)


# AUC_grid_models_quartile <- lapply(names(AUC_grid_subset_rules_quartile), function(name) {
#   print(AUC_grid_subset_rules_quartile[[name]])
#   rule <- AUC_grid_subset_rules_quartile[[name]]
#   model_eval_fun(
#     formula = "HIPR ~ HIC15_log",
#     data = subset(madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise, eval(parse(text = rule)))
#   )
# })
# names(AUC_grid_models_quartile) <- names(AUC_grid_subset_rules_quartile)
# 
# print(xtab_df_dv_quartile)
# 
# 
# AUC_grid_models_quintile <- lapply(names(AUC_grid_subset_rules_quintile), function(name) {
#   print(AUC_grid_subset_rules_quintile[[name]])
#   rule <- AUC_grid_subset_rules_quintile[[name]]
#   model_eval_fun(
#     formula = "HIPR ~ HIC15_log",
#     data = subset(madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise, eval(parse(text = rule)))
#   )
# })
# names(AUC_grid_models_quintile) <- names(AUC_grid_subset_rules_quintile)
# 
# print(xtab_df_dv_quintile)



# compare models in AUC_grid_models_tertile with roc_grid_fun
AUC_grid_comparison_df_tertile <- roc_grid_fun(AUC_grid_models_tertile, col_num = 3)
print(AUC_grid_comparison_df_tertile)

# compare models in AUC_grid_models_tertile with roc_grid_fun
AUC_grid_comparison_df_DV_and_BMI_tertile <- roc_grid_fun(AUC_grid_models_DV_and_BMI_tertile, col_num = 4)
print(AUC_grid_comparison_df_DV_and_BMI_tertile)

# # compare models in AUC_grid_models_tertile with roc_grid_fun
# AUC_grid_comparison_df_quartile <- roc_grid_fun(AUC_grid_models_quartile, col_num = 4)
# AUC_grid_comparison_df_quartile
# 
# # compare models in AUC_grid_models_tertile with roc_grid_fun
# AUC_grid_comparison_df_quintile <- roc_grid_fun(AUC_grid_models_quintile, col_num = 5)
# AUC_grid_comparison_df_quintile


```




```{r ROC grid given vars function}
# creates grid of ROC curves that are split by xtiles (defined in argument) for 2 continuous variables to compare.
# var_x is variable that appears on x-axis, var y is variable on y-axis
roc_grid_interaction_fun <- function(
    df = madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise, 
    var_x = DVEST_MPH, 
    var_y = BMI, 
    var_x_lab = "Delta V (MPH)",
    var_y_lab = "BMI (kg/m^2)",
    num_levels1 = 3, 
    num_levels2 = 3, 
    outcome_var = "HIPR", 
    predictor = "HIC15_log") {
  
  # Create xtiles for both variables
  var_x_name <- deparse(substitute(var_x))
  var_y_name <- deparse(substitute(var_y))
  
  var_x_xtile_name <- paste0(var_x_name, "_xtile")
  var_y_xtile_name <- paste0(var_y_name, "_xtile")
  
  # Create temporary df with xtiles
  temp_df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      !!var_x_xtile_name := as.factor(ntile({{var_x}}, num_levels1)),
      !!var_y_xtile_name := as.factor(ntile({{var_y}}, num_levels2))
    )
  
  # Get min/max for each xtile
  var_x_min_max <- temp_df %>%
    group_by(!!sym(var_x_xtile_name)) %>%
    summarise(
      min = min(round({{var_x}}), na.rm = TRUE),
      max = max(round({{var_x}}), na.rm = TRUE)
    )
  
  var_y_min_max <- temp_df %>%
    group_by(!!sym(var_y_xtile_name)) %>%
    summarise(
      min = min(round({{var_y}}), na.rm = TRUE),
      max = max(round({{var_y}}), na.rm = TRUE)
    )
  
  # Create all combinations of rules in the correct order
  subset_rules <- list()
  
  # 1. Individual cells (var_x levels × var_y levels)
  for (j in 1:num_levels2) {
    for (i in 1:num_levels1) {
      name <- paste0(
        var_x_lab, " ", var_x_min_max$min[i], "-", var_x_min_max$max[i], 
        ", ", var_y_lab, " ", var_y_min_max$min[j], "-", var_y_min_max$max[j]
      )
      rule <- paste0(var_x_xtile_name, " == ", i, " & ", var_y_xtile_name, " == ", j)
      subset_rules[[name]] <- rule
    }
    
    # 2. Row summaries at end of each row (all var_x, fixed var_y level)
    name <- paste0(
      "All ", var_x_lab, 
      ", ", var_y_lab, " ", var_y_min_max$min[j], "-", var_y_min_max$max[j]
    )
    rule <- paste0(var_y_xtile_name, " == ", j)
    subset_rules[[name]] <- rule
  }
  
  # 3. Column summaries in last row (fixed var_x level, all var_y)
  for (i in 1:num_levels1) {
    name <- paste0(
      var_x_lab, " ", var_x_min_max$min[i], "-", var_x_min_max$max[i],
      ", All ", var_y_lab
    )
    rule <- paste0(var_x_xtile_name, " == ", i)
    subset_rules[[name]] <- rule
  }
  
  # 4. Full model in bottom-right corner (all var_x, all var_y)
  name <- paste0("All ", var_x_lab, ", All ", var_y_lab)
  rule <- paste0(var_x_xtile_name, " %in% 1:", num_levels1, " & ", 
                var_y_xtile_name, " %in% 1:", num_levels2)
  subset_rules[[name]] <- rule
  
  # Create models for each rule
  models <- lapply(names(subset_rules), function(name) {
    rule <- subset_rules[[name]]
    formula <- paste0(outcome_var, " ~ ", predictor)
    model_eval_fun(
      formula = formula,
      data = subset(temp_df, eval(parse(text = rule)))
    )
  })
  names(models) <- names(subset_rules)
  
  # Create ROC grid with correct number of columns
  roc_grid_fun(models, col_num = num_levels1 + 1)  # +1 for the row summaries
}

roc_grid_interaction_fun(
  df = madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise,
  var_x = DVEST_MPH,
  var_y = BMI,
  var_x_lab = "Delta V",
  var_y_lab = "BMI",
  num_levels1 = 3,
  num_levels2 = 3
)
```




```{r AUC grid model build by cases, eval=FALSE}
AUC_grid_subset_rules_tertile_case <- list(
  AUC_grid_DV31_BMIlow = 
    "DV_MPH_tertile_case == 1 & BMI_low == 1",
  AUC_grid_DV32_BMIlow = 
    "DV_MPH_tertile_case == 2 & BMI_low == 1",
  AUC_grid_DV33_BMIlow = 
    "DV_MPH_tertile_case == 3 & BMI_low == 1",
  AUC_grid_DV31_BMIhigh = 
    "DV_MPH_tertile_case == 1 & BMI_low == 0",
  AUC_grid_DV32_BMIhigh = 
    "DV_MPH_tertile_case == 2 & BMI_low == 0",
  AUC_grid_DV33_BMIhigh = 
    "DV_MPH_tertile_case == 3 & BMI_low == 0"
)

AUC_grid_subset_rules_quartile_case <- list(
  AUC_grid_DV41_BMIlow = 
    "DV_MPH_quartile_case == 1 & BMI_low == 1",
  AUC_grid_DV42_BMIlow = 
    "DV_MPH_quartile_case == 2 & BMI_low == 1",
  AUC_grid_DV43_BMIlow = 
    "DV_MPH_quartile_case == 3 & BMI_low == 1",
  AUC_grid_DV44_BMIlow = 
    "DV_MPH_quartile_case == 4 & BMI_low == 1",
  AUC_grid_DV41_BMIhigh = 
    "DV_MPH_quartile_case == 1 & BMI_low == 0",
  AUC_grid_DV42_BMIhigh = 
    "DV_MPH_quartile_case == 2 & BMI_low == 0",
  AUC_grid_DV43_BMIhigh = 
    "DV_MPH_quartile_case == 3 & BMI_low == 0",
  AUC_grid_DV44_BMIhigh = 
    "DV_MPH_quartile_case == 4 & BMI_low == 0"
)

AUC_grid_subset_rules_quintile_case <- list(
  AUC_grid_DV51_BMIlow = 
    "DV_MPH_quintile_case == 1 & BMI_low == 1",
  AUC_grid_DV52_BMIlow = 
    "DV_MPH_quintile_case == 2 & BMI_low == 1",
  AUC_grid_DV53_BMIlow = 
    "DV_MPH_quintile_case == 3 & BMI_low == 1",
  AUC_grid_DV54_BMIlow = 
    "DV_MPH_quintile_case == 4 & BMI_low == 1",
  AUC_grid_DV55_BMIlow = 
    "DV_MPH_quintile_case == 5 & BMI_low == 1",
  AUC_grid_DV51_BMIhigh = 
    "DV_MPH_quintile_case == 1 & BMI_low == 0",
  AUC_grid_DV52_BMIhigh = 
    "DV_MPH_quintile_case == 2 & BMI_low == 0",
  AUC_grid_DV53_BMIhigh = 
    "DV_MPH_quintile_case == 3 & BMI_low == 0",
  AUC_grid_DV54_BMIhigh = 
    "DV_MPH_quintile_case == 4 & BMI_low == 0",
  AUC_grid_DV55_BMIhigh = 
    "DV_MPH_quintile_case == 5 & BMI_low == 0"
)


AUC_grid_models_tertile_case <- lapply(names(AUC_grid_subset_rules_tertile_case), function(name) {
  print(AUC_grid_subset_rules_tertile_case[[name]])
  rule <- AUC_grid_subset_rules_tertile_case[[name]]
  model_eval_fun(
    formula = "HIPR ~ HIC15_log",
    data = subset(madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise, eval(parse(text = rule)))
  )
})
names(AUC_grid_models_tertile_case) <- names(AUC_grid_subset_rules_tertile_case)

print(xtab_df_dv_tertile_case)


AUC_grid_models_quartile_case <- lapply(names(AUC_grid_subset_rules_quartile_case), function(name) {
  print(AUC_grid_subset_rules_quartile_case[[name]])
  rule <- AUC_grid_subset_rules_quartile_case[[name]]
  model_eval_fun(
    formula = "HIPR ~ HIC15_log",
    data = subset(madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise, eval(parse(text = rule)))
  )
})
names(AUC_grid_models_quartile_case) <- names(AUC_grid_subset_rules_quartile_case)

print(xtab_df_dv_quartile_case)


AUC_grid_models_quintile_case <- lapply(names(AUC_grid_subset_rules_quintile_case), function(name) {
  print(AUC_grid_subset_rules_quintile_case[[name]])
  rule <- AUC_grid_subset_rules_quintile_case[[name]]
  model_eval_fun(
    formula = "HIPR ~ HIC15_log",
    data = subset(madymo_nhtsa_df_listwise, eval(parse(text = rule)))
  )
})
names(AUC_grid_models_quintile_case) <- names(AUC_grid_subset_rules_quintile_case)

print(xtab_df_dv_quintile_case)



# compare models in AUC_grid_models_tertile_case with roc_grid_fun
AUC_grid_comparison_df_tertile_case <- roc_grid_fun(AUC_grid_models_tertile_case)
AUC_grid_comparison_df_tertile_case

# compare models in AUC_grid_models_tertile_case with roc_grid_fun
AUC_grid_comparison_df_quartile_case <- roc_grid_fun(AUC_grid_models_quartile_case, col_num = 4)
AUC_grid_comparison_df_quartile_case

# compare models in AUC_grid_models_tertile_case with roc_grid_fun
AUC_grid_comparison_df_quintile_case <- roc_grid_fun(AUC_grid_models_quintile_case, col_num = 5)
AUC_grid_comparison_df_quintile_case


```

```{r AUC grid DV BMI split, eval=FALSE}
# Step 1: Named list of main model objects
model_objs_listwise_stepwise_bmi <- list(
  
)

```

```{r baseline descriptives function}
# for continuous variables, t.test
# for categorical variables, chisq.test (if less than 5, fisher.test)
baseline_desc_fun <- function(df) {
  # Create cases and controls data frames
cases_df <- df %>% filter(HIPR == 1)
controls_df <- df %>% filter(HIPR == 0)

# Define variables with labels and types
baseline_vars <- list(
  list(var_name = "DV_MPH", label = "Delta V (mph)", type = "continuous"),
  list(var_name = "SEATPOS", label = "Seat Position", type = "categorical"),
  list(var_name = "BELTUSE_BIN", label = "Belt Use (%)", type = "categorical"),
  list(var_name = "BAGDEPLOY_BIN", label = "Airbag Deployment (%)", type = "categorical"),
  list(var_name = "AGE", label = "Age", type = "continuous"),
  list(var_name = "BMI", label = "BMI in kg/m²", type = "continuous"),
  list(var_name = "SEX_BIN", label = "Sex (%)", type = "categorical"),
  list(var_name = "ALCINV", label = "Alcohol Involvement (%)", type = "categorical"),
  list(var_name = "WEATHER", label = "Weather Conditions (%)", type = "categorical"),
  list(var_name = "VEHWGT", label = "Vehicle Weight (lbs)", type = "continuous"),
  # list(var_name = "MAKE", label = "Vehicle Make", type = "categorical"),
  list(var_name = "MODELYR", label = "Vehicle Model Year", type = "continuous"),
  list(var_name = "TIME_cat", label = "Time of Day", type = "categorical"),
```
